name: mobile-stack-translator
description: A mobile development skill for explaining how code, patterns, and platform concepts map across Swift/iOS, Kotlin/Android, Flutter, and React Native.

interface.shortDescription: Explain mobile code across major app stacks
interface.longDescription: Help mobile developers understand how snippets, files, features, lifecycle patterns, UI state, navigation, concurrency, persistence, networking, and tests map between Swift/iOS, Kotlin/Android, Flutter, and React Native.
defaultPrompt: Use $mobile-stack-translator to explain how this mobile code maps to another stack.
Compare this Swift, Kotlin, Flutter, or React Native code with the equivalent pattern in another mobile framework.
